controls.control_objective: To ensure issue directions to authorised persons who are indian agents under the mtss through a
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that whenever
necessary, Reserve Bank shall issue directions to Authorised Persons who are Indian
Agents under the MTSS through A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue directions to authorised persons who are indian agents under the mtss through a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be simultaneously amended suitably
controls.control_description:
The Master Direction issued herewith shall be simultaneously amended
suitably.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be simultaneously amended suitably

controls.control_objective: To ensure accord necessary permission (authorization) to any person to act as an indian agent under the money transfer service scheme
controls.control_description:
1.2 Statutory Basis
In terms of the powers granted under Section 10(1) of the Foreign Exchange
Management Act (FEMA), 1999, the Reserve Bank of India may accord necessary
permission (authorization) to any person to act as an Indian Agent under the Money
Transfer Service Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to accord necessary permission (authorization) to any person to act as an indian agent under the money transfer service scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person authorised as an authorised dealer under sub-section (1) of section 10 of fema
controls.control_description:
2.1 'Authorised Dealer' (AD) means a person authorised as an authorised dealer
under sub-section (1) of section 10 of FEMA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person authorised as an authorised dealer under sub-section (1) of section 10 of fema

controls.control_objective: To ensure (i) upgraded ffmcs
controls.control_description: 2.2 'Authorised Dealer (AD) Category II' means (i) Upgraded FFMCs;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to (i) upgraded ffmcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an authorised dealer category-i bank or an authorised dealer category-ii or a full fledged money changer (ffmc), or a scheduled commercial bank or
controls.control_description:
(i) The applicant to become an Indian Agent should be an Authorised Dealer
Category-I bank or an Authorised Dealer Category-II or a Full Fledged Money
Changer (FFMC), or a Scheduled Commercial Bank or the Department of Posts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an authorised dealer category-i bank or an authorised dealer category-ii or a full fledged money changer (ffmc), or a scheduled commercial bank or

controls.control_objective: To ensure have minimum net owned funds of rs
controls.control_description: (ii) The applicant should have minimum Net Owned Funds of Rs.50 lakh.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have minimum net owned funds of rs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made 1(through the apconnect application (https://apconnect
controls.control_description:
3.2 Procedure for making Applications to the Reserve Bank
Application for necessary permission to act as an Indian Agent may be made
1(through the APConnect application (https://apconnect.rbi.org.in/entity) by non-bank
AD Category-II and FFMCs) to the respective regional office of the Foreign Exchange
Department of the Reserve Bank of India, under whose jurisdiction the registered
office of the applicant falls and should be accompanied by the documents pertaining
to its proposed Overseas Principal, as detailed below:
a) A declaration to the effect that no proceedings have been initiated by / are
pending with the Directorate of Enforcement (DoE) / Directorate of Revenue
Intelligence (DRI) or any other law enforcing authorities, against the applicant
or its directors and that no criminal cases are initiated / pending against the
applicant or its directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made 1(through the apconnect application (https://apconnect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept by the overseas principal in favour of the indian agent with a designated bank in india
controls.control_description:
3.3 Collateral requirement
Collateral equivalent to 3 days' average drawings or USD 50,000, whichever is
higher, may be kept by the Overseas Principal in favour of the Indian Agent with a
designated bank in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept by the overseas principal in favour of the indian agent with a designated bank in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept as a 2 modified vide a
controls.control_description:
The minimum amount of USD 50,000 shall be kept as a
2 Modified vide A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept as a 2 modified vide a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept in the form of a bank guarantee
controls.control_description:
16 dated November 28, 2025
foreign currency deposit while the balance amount may be kept in the form of a Bank
Guarantee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept in the form of a bank guarantee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed by indian agents at quarterly intervals on the basis of remittances received during the past three months
controls.control_description:
The adequacy of collateral should be reviewed by Indian Agents at
quarterly intervals on the basis of remittances received during the past three months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed by indian agents at quarterly intervals on the basis of remittances received during the past three months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed under this arrangement
controls.control_description:
Only cross-border personal remittances, such as, remittances towards family
maintenance and remittances favouring foreign tourists visiting India shall be allowed
under this arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed under this arrangement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made through this arrangement
controls.control_description:
Donations/ contributions to charitable institutions/t rusts,
trade related remittances, remittance towards purchase of property, investments or
credit to NRE Accounts shall not be made through this arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made through this arrangement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid in cash to a beneficiary in india
controls.control_description: Amounts up to Rs.50,000/- may be paid in cash to a beneficiary in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid in cash to a beneficiary in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid by means of account payee cheque/ demand draft/ payment order, etc
controls.control_description:
Any amount
exceeding this limit shall be paid by means of account payee cheque/ demand draft/
payment order, etc., or credited directly to the beneficiary's bank account only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid by means of account payee cheque/ demand draft/ payment order, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disbursed in cash
controls.control_description:
However, in exceptional circumstances, where the beneficiary is a foreign tourist,
higher amounts may be disbursed in cash.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disbursed in cash

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept on record for scrutiny by the auditors/ inspectors
controls.control_description:
Full details of such transactions should be
kept on record for scrutiny by the auditors/ inspectors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept on record for scrutiny by the auditors/ inspectors

controls.control_objective: To ensure commence its money transfer operations under the scheme within a period of six months from the date of issuance of permission (authorization) and info
controls.control_description:
(ii) The Indian Agent should commence its money transfer operations under the
scheme within a period of six months from the date of issuance of permission
(authorization) and inform the regional office concerned of the Foreign Exchange
Department of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to commence its money transfer operations under the scheme within a period of six months from the date of issuance of permission (authorization) and info

controls.control_objective: To ensure note that overseas principals with adequate volume of business, track record and outreach will only be considered under the scheme
controls.control_description:
Guidelines for Overseas Principals
Indian Agents entering into arrangements with Money Transfer Operators overseas,
known as Overseas Principals, may note that Overseas Principals with adequate
volume of business, track record and outreach will only be considered under the
scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to note that overseas principals with adequate volume of business, track record and outreach will only be considered under the scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure of receipt of remittances, operators with limited outreach in terms of branch network in the country and localized operations overseas will not be ent
controls.control_description:
Further, since the primary objective of permitting the business of money
transfer business in the country is to facilitate cheaper and more efficient means of
receipt of remittances, operators with limited outreach in terms of branch network in
the country and localized operations overseas will not be entertained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to of receipt of remittances, operators with limited outreach in terms of branch network in the country and localized operations overseas will not be ent

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the following documents/ comply with the following requirements, in respect of their overseas principals: a) the overseas principal should obta
controls.control_description:
Applicant Indian Agents should submit the following documents/ comply with the
following requirements, in respect of their Overseas Principals:
a) The Overseas Principal should obtain necessary authorisation from the
Department of Payment and Settlement Systems, Reserve Bank of India
under the provisions of the Payment and Settlement Systems Act (PSS Act),
2007 to commence/ operate a payment system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the following documents/ comply with the following requirements, in respect of their overseas principals: a) the overseas principal should obta

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a registered entity, licenced by the central bank / government or financial regulatory authority of the country concerned for carrying on money tra
controls.control_description:
of India,
b) The Overseas Principal should be a registered entity, licenced by the Central
Bank / Government or financial regulatory authority of the country concerned
for carrying on Money Transfer Activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a registered entity, licenced by the central bank / government or financial regulatory authority of the country concerned for carrying on money tra

controls.control_objective: To ensure be aml compliant
controls.control_description:
The country of registration of the
Overseas Principal should be AML compliant.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be aml compliant

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at least usd 1 million as per the latest audited balance sheet, which should be maintained at all times
controls.control_description:
c) The minimum net-worth of Overseas Principals should be at least USD 1
million as per the latest audited balance sheet, which should be maintained at
all times.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at least usd 1 million as per the latest audited balance sheet, which should be maintained at all times

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider relaxing the minimum net worth criterion in case of overseas principals incorporated in fatf member countries and are supervised by the conce
controls.control_description:
However, the Reserve Bank may consider relaxing the minimum Net
Worth criterion in case of Overseas Principals incorporated in FATF member
countries and are supervised by the concerned Central Bank/ Government or
financial regulatory authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider relaxing the minimum net worth criterion in case of overseas principals incorporated in fatf member countries and are supervised by the conce

controls.control_objective: To ensure be well established in the money transfer business with a track record of operations in well regulated markets
controls.control_description:
d) The Overseas Principal should be well established in the money transfer
business with a track record of operations in well regulated markets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be well established in the money transfer business with a track record of operations in well regulated markets

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in considerably increasing access to formal money transfer facilities at both ends
controls.control_description:
e) The arrangement with Overseas Principal should result in considerably
increasing access to formal money transfer facilities at both ends.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in considerably increasing access to formal money transfer facilities at both ends

controls.control_objective: To ensure be registered with the overseas trade / industry bodies
controls.control_description:
f) The Overseas Principal should be registered with the overseas trade / Industry
bodies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be registered with the overseas trade / industry bodies

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a good rating from one of the international credit rating agencies
controls.control_description:
g) The Overseas Principal should have a good rating from one of the
international credit rating agencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a good rating from one of the international credit rating agencies

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit confidential reports from at least two of its bankers
controls.control_description:
h) The Overseas Principal should submit confidential reports from at least two of
its bankers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit confidential reports from at least two of its bankers

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a report certified by independent chartered accountants, regarding steps taken to comply with anti-money laundering norms in the home/ host cou
controls.control_description:
i) The Overseas Principal should submit a report certified by independent
Chartered Accountants, regarding steps taken to comply with anti-money
laundering norms in the home/ host country.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a report certified by independent chartered accountants, regarding steps taken to comply with anti-money laundering norms in the home/ host cou

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made accessible on demand to the reserve bank or other agencies of the government of india, viz
controls.control_description:
All records must be
made accessible on demand to the Reserve Bank or other agencies of the
Government of India, viz., Ministry of Finance, Ministry of Home Affairs, FIU-
IND, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made accessible on demand to the reserve bank or other agencies of the government of india, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided by the overseas principals
controls.control_description:
Full details of the remitters and the beneficiaries should be provided
by the Overseas Principals, if called for.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided by the overseas principals

controls.control_objective: To ensure take due care to avoid appointing individuals/ entities as sub agents who have cases / proceedings initiated / pending against them by any law enforci
controls.control_description:
Guidelines for appointment of Sub Agents by Indian Agents
Note: Although obtaining of conduct certificate of the Sub Agent from the local police authorities is non-mandatory for the Indian Agents, the Indian Agents must take due care to avoid appointing individuals/ entities as Sub Agents who have cases / proceedings initiated / pending against them by any law enforcing agencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take due care to avoid appointing individuals/ entities as sub agents who have cases / proceedings initiated / pending against them by any law enforci

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a place of business, and whose bonafides are acceptable to the indian agent
controls.control_description:
5.2 Sub Agents
A Sub Agent should have a place of business, and whose bonafides are acceptable
to the Indian Agent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a place of business, and whose bonafides are acceptable to the indian agent

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit on a quarterly basis necessary information in the prescribed format in soft copy form pertaining to their sub agents appointed during a quarter
controls.control_description:
Indian Agents should submit on a quarterly basis necessary information in the
prescribed format in soft copy form pertaining to their Sub Agents appointed during a
quarter within 15 days from the end of the quarter, to the respective regional offices
of the Foreign Exchange Department of the Reserve Bank under whose jurisdiction
the registered office of the Indian Agent falls for onward submission to the Ministry of
Home Affairs (MHA), Govt.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit on a quarterly basis necessary information in the prescribed format in soft copy form pertaining to their sub agents appointed during a quarter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be terminated immediately
controls.control_description:
In case of any objection by the MHA, the Sub Agency
arrangement concerned should be terminated immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be terminated immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure also furnish certificates that the sub agents appointed by them comply with the eligibility norms and also they have done due diligence
controls.control_description:
Indian Agents should also furnish certificates that the Sub Agents appointed by them
comply with the eligibility norms and also they have done due diligence, wherever
applicable, in respect of their Sub Agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also furnish certificates that the sub agents appointed by them comply with the eligibility norms and also they have done due diligence

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake the following minimum checks while conducting due diligence of the sub agents, other than ad category-i, ad category-ii, scheduled commercia
controls.control_description:
5.4 Due Diligence of Sub Agents
The Indian Agents and the Overseas Principals should undertake the following
minimum checks while conducting due diligence of the Sub Agents, other than AD
Category-I, AD Category-II, Scheduled Commercial Banks, Full Fledged Money
Changers and the Department of Posts:
• Existing business activities of the Sub Agent/ its position in area
• Shop & Establishment/ other applicable municipal certification in favour of the
Sub Agent
• Verification of physical existence of location of the Sub Agent
• Conduct certificate of the Sub Agent from the local police authorities (certified
copy of Memorandum and Articles of Association and Certificate of
Incorporation in respect of incorporated entities).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake the following minimum checks while conducting due diligence of the sub agents, other than ad category-i, ad category-ii, scheduled commercia

controls.control_objective: To ensure be advised to the reserve bank
controls.control_description: However, this may be advised to the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be advised to the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted by indian agents
controls.control_description:
Regular spot audits of all locations of Sub Agents, at least on a monthly basis, should
be conducted by Indian Agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted by indian agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure involve a dedicated team and 'mystery customer' (individuals acting as potential customers to experience and measure the extent up to which people and
controls.control_description:
Such audits should involve a dedicated team and
'mystery customer' (Individuals acting as potential customers to experience and
measure the extent up to which people and process perform as they should) concept
should be used to test the compliance carried out by Sub Agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to involve a dedicated team and 'mystery customer' (individuals acting as potential customers to experience and measure the extent up to which people and

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place
controls.control_description:
As mentioned
above, a system of inspection of the books of the Sub Agents should be put in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done at least once a year, would be to ensure that the money transfer business is being carried out by the sub agents in conformity with the terms
controls.control_description:
The purpose of such inspection, which should be done at least once a year, would be
to ensure that the money transfer business is being carried out by the Sub Agents in
conformity with the terms of agreement/prevailing RBI guidelines and that necessary
records are being maintained by the Sub Agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done at least once a year, would be to ensure that the money transfer business is being carried out by the sub agents in conformity with the terms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made not later than one month, or such other period as the reserve bank may prescribe, before the expiry of the permission
controls.control_description:
Guidelines for renewal of permission (authorization) of existing Indian
Agents
Note :- An application for the renewal of permission under MTSS shall be made not later than one month, or such other period as the Reserve Bank may prescribe, before the expiry of the permission.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made not later than one month, or such other period as the reserve bank may prescribe, before the expiry of the permission

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue in force until the date on which the permission is renewed or the application for renewal of permission is rejected, as the case may be
controls.control_description: Where an entity submits an application for the renewal of its MTSS permission, the permission shall continue in force until the date on which the permission is renewed or the application for renewal of permission is rejected, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue in force until the date on which the permission is renewed or the application for renewal of permission is rejected, as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made after the expiry of the permission
controls.control_description: No application for renewal of MTSS permission shall be made after the expiry of the permission.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made after the expiry of the permission

controls.control_objective: To ensure be renewed for one to three years at a time on the basis of fulfilment of all conditions and other directions/ instructions issued by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(i) Necessary permission to Indian Agents will be issued initially for a period of one
year, which may be renewed for one to three years at a time on the basis of fulfilment
of all conditions and other directions/ instructions issued by the Reserve Bank from
time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be renewed for one to three years at a time on the basis of fulfilment of all conditions and other directions/ instructions issued by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an authorised dealer category-i bank or an authorised dealer category-ii or a full fledged money changer (ffmc)
controls.control_description:
(ii) The applicant should be an Authorised Dealer Category-I bank or an Authorised
Dealer Category-II or a Full Fledged Money Changer (FFMC).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an authorised dealer category-i bank or an authorised dealer category-ii or a full fledged money changer (ffmc)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have minimum net owned funds of rs
controls.control_description: (iii) The Indian Agent should have minimum Net Owned Funds of Rs.50 lakh.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have minimum net owned funds of rs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted 3(through the apconnect application by non-bank ad category-ii and ffmcs) to the regional office concerned of the foreign exchange depart
controls.control_description:
(iv) Application for renewal of permission should be submitted 3(through the
APConnect application by non-bank AD Category-II and FFMCs) to the Regional
Office concerned of the Foreign Exchange Department of the Reserve Bank under
whose jurisdiction the registered office of the Indian Agent falls along-with the
documents pertaining to the Overseas Principal as detailed above and the following
documents:
a) A declaration to the effect that no proceedings have been initiated by/ are
pending with the Directorate of Enforcement (DoE)/ Directorate of Revenue
Intelligence (DRI) or any other law enforcing authorities, against the Indian
Agent or its directors and that no criminal cases are initiated/ pending against
the Indian Agent or its directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted 3(through the apconnect application by non-bank ad category-ii and ffmcs) to the regional office concerned of the foreign exchange depart

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted by the reserve bank under the provisions of section 12(1) of the fema, 1999
controls.control_description:
Inspection of Indian Agents
Inspections of the Indian Agents may be conducted by the Reserve Bank under the
provisions of Section 12(1) of the FEMA, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted by the reserve bank under the provisions of section 12(1) of the fema, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure , mutatis mutandis, be applicable to all authorised persons (aps), who are indian agents under mtss and to their sub-agents
controls.control_description:
(i) Detailed instructions on Know Your Customer (KYC) norms4/ Anti-Money
Laundering (AML) standards/ Combating the Financing of Terrorism (CFT) for Indian
Agents under MTSS in respect of cross-border inward remittance activities, in the
context of the FATF Recommendations on Anti Money Laundering standards and on
Combating the Financing of Terrorism issued by Reserve Bank of India shall, mutatis
mutandis, be applicable to all Authorised Persons (APs), who are Indian agents
under MTSS and to their Sub-agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , mutatis mutandis, be applicable to all authorised persons (aps), who are indian agents under mtss and to their sub-agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be electronically credited directly to the account of the beneficiary, held with a bank other than the indian agent bank (termed as 'recipient bank')
controls.control_description:
Foreign inward remittances received by the bank acting as Indian
Agent under MTSS (termed as 'Partner Bank'), may also be electronically credited
directly to the account of the beneficiary, held with a bank other than the Indian Agent
Bank (termed as 'Recipient Bank'), subject to the following conditions:
a) The Recipient Bank will credit the amount transferred by the Partner bank only
to KYC compliant bank accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be electronically credited directly to the account of the beneficiary, held with a bank other than the indian agent bank (termed as 'recipient bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out kyc/ customer due diligence (cdd) of the recipient before the remittance to such account is credited or allowed to be withdrawn
controls.control_description:
b) In respect of the bank accounts which are not KYC compliant, the Recipient
Bank shall carry out KYC/ Customer Due Diligence (CDD) of the recipient
before the remittance to such account is credited or allowed to be withdrawn.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out kyc/ customer due diligence (cdd) of the recipient before the remittance to such account is credited or allowed to be withdrawn

controls.control_objective: To ensure appropriately mark the direct-to-account remittances to indicate to the recipient bank that it is a foreign inward remittance
controls.control_description:
c) The Partner Bank shall appropriately mark the direct-to-account remittances to
indicate to the Recipient Bank that it is a foreign inward remittance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appropriately mark the direct-to-account remittances to indicate to the recipient bank that it is a foreign inward remittance

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that accurate originator information and necessary beneficiary information is included in the electronic message while transferring the fund to
controls.control_description:
d) The Partner Bank shall ensure that accurate originator information and
necessary beneficiary information is included in the electronic message while
transferring the fund to the Recipient Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that accurate originator information and necessary beneficiary information is included in the electronic message while transferring the fund to

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available in the remittance message throughout the payment chain i
controls.control_description:
This information should be
available in the remittance message throughout the payment chain i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available in the remittance message throughout the payment chain i

controls.control_objective: To ensure add an appropriate alert in the electronic message indicating that 4 modified vide a
controls.control_description:
The Partner
Bank should add an appropriate alert in the electronic message indicating that
4 Modified vide A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to add an appropriate alert in the electronic message indicating that 4 modified vide a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be credited to kyc non- compliant account or nre/ nro accounts
controls.control_description:
16 dated November 28, 2025
this is a foreign inward remittance and should not be credited to KYC non-
compliant account or NRE/ NRO accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be credited to kyc non- compliant account or nre/ nro accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained by the recipient bank as per the provisions of prevention of money laundering (maintenance of records) rules, 2005
controls.control_description:
e) The identification and other documents of the recipient shall be maintained by
the Recipient Bank as per the provisions of Prevention of Money Laundering
(Maintenance of Records) Rules, 2005.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained by the recipient bank as per the provisions of prevention of money laundering (maintenance of records) rules, 2005

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adhered to by the partner bank
controls.control_description:
All other requirements under KYC/
AML/ CFT guidelines issued by the Reserve Bank of India for MTSS from time
to time shall be adhered to by the Partner Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adhered to by the partner bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure report suspicious transactions to the fiu-ind with details of the partner bank through which they received the remittances
controls.control_description:
f) The Recipient Bank may seek additional information from the Partner Bank
and shall report suspicious transactions to the FIU-IND with details of the
Partner Bank through which they received the remittances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report suspicious transactions to the fiu-ind with details of the partner bank through which they received the remittances

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit their annual audited balance sheet along with a certificate on net worth from their statutory auditors to the concerned regional office of t
controls.control_description:
General Instructions
All Overseas Principals are required to submit their annual audited balance sheet
along with a certificate on Net Worth from their Statutory Auditors to the concerned
Regional Office of the Foreign Exchange Department and the Department of Payment
and Settlement Systems of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit their annual audited balance sheet along with a certificate on net worth from their statutory auditors to the concerned regional office of t

controls.control_objective: To ensure to bring it to the notice of the reserve bank immediately along with a detailed plan of restoring the net worth/ net owned funds to the minimum required level
controls.control_description:
As the Overseas Principals and
the Indian Agents are expected to maintain minimum Net Worth and Net Owned Funds
respectively on an ongoing basis, they are required to bring it to the notice of the
Reserve Bank immediately along with a detailed plan of restoring the Net Worth/ Net
Owned Funds to the minimum required level, if there is any reduction in their Net
Worth/ Net Owned Funds below the minimum level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to bring it to the notice of the reserve bank immediately along with a detailed plan of restoring the net worth/ net owned funds to the minimum required level

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effected by the person(s) authorised, who should carry the supporting documents while moving the cash
controls.control_description:
All movement of Indian currency or foreign exchange should be effected by the
person(s) authorised, who should carry the supporting documents while moving
the cash.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effected by the person(s) authorised, who should carry the supporting documents while moving the cash

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on the basis of requisition made by the receiver and to the address of the destination
controls.control_description:
The movement should be on the basis of requisition made by the
receiver and to the address of the destination.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on the basis of requisition made by the receiver and to the address of the destination

controls.control_objective: To ensure leave the place only after it has been recorded in the books of accounts of the ap
controls.control_description:
If the cash is being moved from the office/branch of the AP, it should leave the
place only after it has been recorded in the books of accounts of the AP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to leave the place only after it has been recorded in the books of accounts of the ap

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recorded in the books of accounts of the ap, on the same day or on the date of receipt
controls.control_description:
Similarly, if the destination point of movement of the currency is the
office/branch of the AP, it should be recorded in the books of accounts of the
AP, on the same day or on the date of receipt.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recorded in the books of accounts of the ap, on the same day or on the date of receipt

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accounted as stock transfer and not as sale so that double counting is avoided
controls.control_description:
Transfer of foreign currency between branches of the same AP should be
accounted as stock transfer and not as sale so that double counting is avoided.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accounted as stock transfer and not as sale so that double counting is avoided

controls.control_objective: To ensure take place in the office of the ap and the transaction should be supported by necessary documents for value received
controls.control_description:
In the case of doorstep forex service by FFMCs / Authorised Dealers Category II to
their regular customers, inter-alia, the processing and accounting of the transaction
should take place in the office of the AP and the transaction should be supported by
necessary documents for value received.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take place in the office of the ap and the transaction should be supported by necessary documents for value received

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done by authorised officials of the ap only
controls.control_description:
The delivery of the forex should be done by
authorised officials of the AP only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done by authorised officials of the ap only

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made through banking channels (viz
controls.control_description:
As far as possible movement of Indian Currency should be made through banking
channels (viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made through banking channels (viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled by way of account payee crossed cheques / demand drafts/ and in no circumstances the settlement of indian currency should be made in cash
controls.control_description:
The transactions
between authorized dealers and FFMCs should be settled by way of account payee
crossed cheques / demand drafts/ and in no circumstances the settlement of Indian
Currency should be made in cash.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled by way of account payee crossed cheques / demand drafts/ and in no circumstances the settlement of indian currency should be made in cash

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deposited to a bank branch on the same day or next day
controls.control_description:
The cash (INR) collected by the AP or its franchisee
should be deposited to a bank branch on the same day or next day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deposited to a bank branch on the same day or next day

controls.control_objective: To ensure be properly documented
controls.control_description:
The cancellation of any move for transportation of cash should be properly
documented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be properly documented

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in sync with the documents
controls.control_description: The movement of cash should be in sync with the documents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in sync with the documents
